hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,subprocess,glob,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); scripts=sorted(glob.glob(os.path.expanduser('~/.claude/plugins/cache/openai-codex/codex/*/scripts/codex-companion.mjs'))); [subprocess.Popen(['node',scripts[-1],'security-review','--effort','high'],stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL,stderr=subprocess.DEVNULL) or print('[codex] PHI-boundary security review dispatched in background — check /codex:status') for _ in [1] if 'gh pr create' in cmd and scripts]" 2>/dev/null; exit 0

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(1 if '.env' in fp and not fp.endswith('.env.example') else 0)" || (echo '[blocked] .env edit rejected — edit manually if intentional' && exit 2)

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(1 if any(fp.endswith(lf) for lf in ['pnpm-lock.yaml','package-lock.json','yarn.lock']) else 0)" || (echo '[blocked] lock file edit rejected — run pnpm install to regenerate' && exit 2)

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(1 if 'apps/mobile/ios/' in fp and not any(fp.endswith(x) for x in ('Info.plist','entitlements','CarelogWatch')) else 0)" || (echo '[blocked] ios/ edit rejected — use expo prebuild to regenerate native projects' && exit 2)

python3 -c "
import sys,json,re
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','')
content=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('content','')
if 'supabaseAdmin' in content and not any(p in fp for p in ['/server/','/app/api/','/supabase/']):
    print(f'[warn] supabaseAdmin used outside server//app/api/ in {fp} — verify this is intentional')
" 2>/dev/null || true
cd apps/web && output=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ -n "$output" ]; then echo "[tsc] $output" | head -20; fi
cd apps/web && output=$(npx eslint --cache --quiet . 2>&1 | head -15); if [ -n "$output" ]; then echo "[eslint] $output"; fi

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print(fp) if fp and any(fp.endswith(e) for e in ['.ts','.tsx','.js','.jsx']) else None" 2>/dev/null | xargs -I{} npx prettier --write {} 2>/dev/null || true

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(0 if 'apps/mobile' in fp and fp.endswith(('.ts','.tsx')) else 1)" 2>/dev/null && cd /Users/bradygrapentine/Documents/projects/carelog/apps/mobile && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -10 || true

python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(0 if any(k in fp.lower() for k in ['auth','rls','migration','policy','supabase/tests']) else 1)" 2>/dev/null && echo '[pgTAP] Auth/RLS file changed — running supabase test db...' && cd /Users/bradygrapentine/Documents/projects/carelog && { output=$(supabase test db 2>&1); ec=$?; echo "$output" | tail -20; [ $ec -ne 0 ] && CODEX=$(ls ~/.claude/plugins/cache/openai-codex/codex/*/scripts/codex-companion.mjs 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1) && [ -n "$CODEX" ] && echo '[codex] pgTAP failed — dispatching fix in background...' && nohup node "$CODEX" task --sandbox workspace-execute --approval-policy confirm --effort medium "Fix failing pgTAP RLS tests in Carelog. Run: supabase test db. Fix root causes. Do not skip or delete tests." >/dev/null 2>&1 & true; } || true
